title: selaginella apoensis
intro: Selaginella apoensis is a species of spore-producing plant in the family Selaginellaceae, commonly known as a resurrection fern due to its unique ability to revive itself from dried state. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Selaginella apoensis may include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, and it is also used in traditional medicine in certain regions.
